Database: metadata_database (sqlite)
  Table: authors — author_id, name
  Table: article_metadata — article_id, author_id, region, publication_date

I've read a good dozen or so Senate outlooks, and my blurry eyes and spinning brain kept getting lost in all the numbers and losing track of who, ultimately, was likely to control the Senate on November third. So I made my very own Senate outlook to figure it out (or add further confusion, depending on what you think of my predictions). The bad news is, we probably won't know who controls the Senate on November third. The good news, if you're a Democrat (or a person who loves one), is that my best guess at this point is that when the dust settles, Democrats will probably be in control by the very slimmest possible margin. Shock! But everyone knows the Dems have no chance of taking either house of Congress. I think everyone hasn't been paying attention. function.name: execute_python
function.arguments:
{"code": "import re

data = env['data_1']
sports_regex = re.compile(r'\bESPN\b|\bNFL\b|\bNBA\b|\bMLB\b|\bNHL\b|\bNCAA\b|\bOlympic|\bfootball\b|\bsoccer\b|\bbasketball\b|\bbaseball\b|\btennis\b|\bgolf\b|\bhockey\b|\bcoach\b|\bleague\b|\btournament\b|\bchampionship\b|\bplayoff\b|\bquarterback\b|\bpitcher\b|\bathlete\b|\bstadium\b|\bmedal\b|\btouchdown\b|\binterception\b|\bhomerun\b|\bstrikeout\b|\bseason\b|\bplayer\b', re.IGNORECASE)

for row in data:
    title = row.get('title', '')
    desc = row.get('description', '')
    text = title + " " + desc
    if sports_regex.search(text):
        print(f"Title: {title}")
        print(f"Desc length: {row.get('desc_length')}")
        print(f"Desc: {desc[:100]}...")
        print("---")
"}

function.name: execute_python
function.arguments:
{"code": "import re

data = env['data_1']
sports_regex = re.compile(r'\bESPN\b|\bNFL\b|\bNBA\b|\bMLB\b|\bNHL\b|\bNCAA\b|\bOlympic|\bfootball\b|\bsoccer\b|\bbasketball\b|\bbaseball\b|\btennis\b|\bgolf\b|\bhockey\b|\bcoach\b|\bleague\b|\btournament\b|\bchampionship\b|\bplayoff\b|\bquarterback\b|\bpitcher\b|\bathlete\b|\bstadium\b|\bmedal\b|\btouchdown\b|\binterception\b|\bhomerun\b|\bstrikeout\b|\bseason\b|\bplayer\b', re.IGNORECASE)

# Filter out false positives
for row in data:
    title = row.get('title', '')
    desc = row.get('description', '')
    text = title + " " + desc
    if sports_regex.search(text):
        # Check if it's actually sports
        if "Senate" in title or "Product" in title or "Amendment" in title or "Cold" in title or "Astronaut" in title:
            continue
        print(f"Title: {title}")
        print(f"Desc length: {row.get('desc_length')}")
        print(f"Desc: {desc[:100]}...")
        print("---")
        break
"}
